case_title: MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC. VS. NIGEL TIMMS
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS TO PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON. THE PETITION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE; HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. (302/HK)
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-05-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Morgan Stanley Smith Barney Llc'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Jun-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Jeff Palmer of Greenber Traurig LLP, Tel. No. 1-415-655-1267
appearing for the Petitioner;
No other appearances on the matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC's petition to confirm arbitration award and enter judgment thereon is granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge; Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302hk
